ddls:
CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the member */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the member joined the platform */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the member */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the member */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the member */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence of the member */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence of the member */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the member */,
  "user_preferences" TEXT /* User preferences and settings */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the member's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan for which the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment (e.g., principal, interest) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., bank transfer, credit card) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID for the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_investors" (
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the investor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the investor */,
  "investment_amount" REAL /* Amount invested by the investor */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan in which the investor invested */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date when the investment was made */,
  "investment_status" TEXT /* Status of the investment (e.g., active, withdrawn) */,
  "investment_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the investment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit report */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member for whom the report was generated */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score from the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the credit report */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Total credit limit */,
  "total_debt" REAL /* Total debt */,
  "credit_utilization" REAL /* Credit utilization ratio */,
  "credit_lines" INTEGER /* Number of open credit lines */,
  "late_payments" INTEGER /* Number of late payments in the report */,
  "inquiries" INTEGER /* Number of inquiries in the report */,
  "credit_history_length" INTEGER /* Length of credit history in months */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_reports_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_status_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan for which the status changed */,
  "previous_status" TEXT /* Previous status of the loan */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New status of the loan */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the status changed */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_purpose_categories" (
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purpose category */,
  "purpose_name" TEXT /* Name of the purpose category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the purpose category */,
  "category_risk_score" INTEGER /* Risk score associated with the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purpose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_titles" (
  "title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment title */,
  "title_name" TEXT /* Name of the employment title */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the employment */,
  "job_title_description" TEXT /* Description of the job title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "verification_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each verification status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the verification status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the verification status */,
  "verification_type" TEXT /* Type of verification (e.g., income, employment) */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date of the verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user interaction */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., loan application, payment, support request) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Details of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance log */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan */,
  "compliance_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance (e.g., KYC, AML) */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance check */,
  "compliance_details" TEXT /* Details of the compliance check */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance check (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_logs_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_support" (
  "support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer support interaction */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member */,
  "support_type" TEXT /* Type of support (e.g., technical, financial) */,
  "support_date" TEXT /* Date of the support interaction */,
  "support_details" TEXT /* Details of the support interaction */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the resolution (e.g., resolved, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_support_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)
